description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a muscular build, standing upright with arms relaxed at his sides. He is dressed in a sleeveless tank top and fitted jeans that have visible knee rips, giving a casual and urban appearance. His footwear consists of high-top sneakers, which add to the streetwear style. The figure has short, closely-cropped hair and a well-defined jawline. The clothing fits snugly, accentuating the athletic physique, and there are no visible accessories or carried objects. The overall look is modern and suitable for a city or neighborhood environment.
description: A muscular adult male in a sleeveless tank top, ripped jeans, and high-top sneakers, standing upright with a casual urban style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sleeveless tank top, muscular arms, fitted ripped jeans, and high-top sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the fit of the tank top and jeans, and the sneaker's side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the tank top, jeans, and the back of the sneakers, with arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and the side of the sneaker.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless tank top and fitted ripped jeans
